welcome.subject: You're in. Here's how to catch your first regression.
welcome.title: Welcome to Seogard
welcome.intro: Your free 14-day trial is active — no credit card required.
welcome.step1Desc: The URL is enough — Seogard discovers your pages via the sitemap.
welcome.step2Desc: Metas, canonicals, H1, SSR/CSR, noindex — analyzed on every page.
welcome.step3Desc: As soon as a regression is detected, you get an email. Nothing to configure.
welcome.footer: Questions? Just reply to this email.

detectedHeading.one: 🔴 {count} regression detected since the last crawl:
detectedHeading.many: 🔴 {count} regressions detected since the last crawl:

fixedHeading.one: 🟢 {count} regression fixed since the last crawl{goodJob}:
fixedHeading.many: 🟢 {count} regressions fixed since the last crawl{goodJob}:

crawlReport.attachmentNote: 📎 Summary PDF attached. For the full detail (all pages) and the history:

dailyDigest.subjectRegressions: Your daily SEO health report — {count} regression(s) on {siteName}
dailyDigest.title: Daily report
dailyDigest.okBody: {pages} pages analyzed on {siteName} — everything is in order.
dailyDigest.okFooter: Tomorrow's report will arrive at the same time. You can view the full history from your dashboard.
dailyDigest.regressionsIntro: {count} regression(s) detected on {siteName} since the last crawl:

logDigest.subject: [WORKER LOGS] {count} alert(s) — {date}
logDigest.title: Worker logs — 24h
logDigest.footer: This digest is sent automatically every day at 8am.

sitemapInvalidHostname.subject: [ACTION REQUIRED] Misconfigured sitemap — {siteName}
sitemapInvalidHostname.title: Sitemap points to the wrong hostname
sitemapInvalidHostname.intro: The sitemap of {siteName} lists {count} URLs with a hostname different from the monitored one ({siteUrl}).
sitemapInvalidHostname.consequence: Consequence: these URLs are ignored by the crawl and only the homepage is analyzed — SEO regressions on your other pages can go unnoticed.
sitemapInvalidHostname.footer: Once your sitemap is fixed, the next crawl will detect your pages automatically.

sitemapBlocked.subject: [ACTION REQUIRED] Sitemap blocked — incomplete crawl on {siteName}
sitemapBlocked.title: Sitemap unreachable
sitemapBlocked.intro: Our crawler could not access the sitemap of {siteName} ({siteUrl}).
sitemapBlocked.consequence: Consequence: only the homepage was analyzed — not your other pages.

crawlerBlocked.subject: [ACTION REQUIRED] {percent}% of pages blocked by WAF — {siteName}
crawlerBlocked.title: Crawler blocked by a firewall (WAF)
crawlerBlocked.intro: {blocked} pages out of {total} ({percent}%) were blocked on {siteName}.
crawlerBlocked.consequence: Consequence: these pages generate no SEO alerts — a regression can go unnoticed.

whitelistHelp.heading: How to fix it
whitelistHelp.option1Desc: Allow requests with {code} in the User-Agent
whitelistHelp.footer: Need help? Just reply to this email.

resetPassword.subject: Reset your Seogard password
resetPassword.title: Password reset
resetPassword.intro: Click the button below to choose a new password:
resetPassword.footer: This link expires in 1 hour. If you did not request this, ignore this email — your password stays unchanged.

sitemapEstimate.subject: Your estimate — {pageCount} pages on {url}
sitemapEstimate.title: Your estimate is ready
sitemapEstimate.statPrice: if you crawl everything / month (excl. VAT)
sitemapEstimate.zoningTitle: Most of our customers crawl 10-20% of their pages.
sitemapEstimate.zoningBody: With zones, target your priority pages — product pages, recent articles, categories — and ignore the rest.
sitemapEstimate.zoningExample: Example: {count} pages → {zonedPrice} EUR/month excl. VAT instead of {fullPrice}.
sitemapEstimate.onPremise: For very large sites, our on-premise offer (hosted on your infrastructure, SLA, account manager) is also available. {contactLink} to discuss it.
sitemapEstimate.trialBody: Detect your first SEO regressions in under 10 minutes. Unlimited crawls during the trial.

paymentFailed.subject: Action needed: your Seogard payment didn't go through
paymentFailed.title: Payment failed
paymentFailed.intro: Your last payment failed. Without action on your part, your crawls will be suspended in 7 days.
paymentFailed.impact: Impact: without an active crawl, SEO regressions go unnoticed — exactly what Seogard is meant to prevent.
paymentFailed.footer: Think this is a mistake? Just reply to this email or write to {supportLink}.

invite.subject: Invitation to join {orgName} on Seogard
invite.title: You're invited
invite.intro: You have been invited to join {orgName} on Seogard.
invite.footer: This link expires in 7 days. If you did not request this invitation, ignore this email.

recoHints.rec_ai_crawlers_blocked: AI systems cannot index your site
